title: Protect Focus from Resets, Clipping, and Overlays
summary: Build and verify css focus visibility in shift action focus disappearance incident through prediction, inspection, explanation, cumulative code, and changed-case transfer.
objectives: Explain css focus visibility from purpose, behavior, and evidence.
Apply css focus visibility without discarding earlier valid work.
Diagnose the named misconception in changed content, input, and failure states.

steps.title: 03 · Read the shift action focus disappearance incident case · theory
steps.instruction: Checkpoint 3: Which claim preserves css focus visibility when data, input, and layout change? Scenario: shift action focus disappearance incident.
steps.why: Protect Focus from Resets, Clipping, and Overlays makes the decision observable and testable. This is checkpoint 3 in shift action focus disappearance incident.

content.text: Focus indicators can disappear through outline resets, low contrast, overflow clipping, overlays, same-color surfaces, transforms, and insufficient offset. A subtle color change is not a robust boundary. Every keyboard-operable target needs visible focus on every background and state, including forced colors and scrolled or sticky contexts. Apply it to shift action focus disappearance incident.
